topic: Writing and evaluating expressions from word problems
latex:
A local restaurant is trying out a new points rewards system. You get $13$ points every time you come in for a meal and one point for every dollar you spend.

How many points would Corey get if he came in for a meal and spent $\$33$?

How many points would he get if he came in for a meal and spent $d$ dollars?
answer_latex:
Points earned for spending $\$33$: $46$

Points earned for spending $d$ dollars: $13 + d$
